title: Dagoth Ur Evoker
description: changes the Evoker model to Dagoth Ur from Morrowind (CEM Model)
body:
**About**

This pack changes the model and texture of Evoker to **Dagoth Ur** from video game The Elder Scrolls 3: Morrowind. *Why?*  Cuz... Why not???

**Requirements**

 To make the resource pack work correctly you need Optifine or [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) + [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
